name: straightjacket
description: Multi-agent test-engineering plugin with two skills over one engine: `straightjacket` locks current behavior, and `tdd` drives new features test-first (spec → red → adversarial-on-red → green → mutation) under a savepoint discipline. Shared pipeline: coverage planning + parallel authoring + adversarial specialist team + synthesis + mutation/fuzz, run as dynamic-Workflow stages when the Workflow tool is available (else direct Agent dispatch). Eleven specialist agents + implementation-author. Ships a Rust binary `straightjacket` in bin/ (deterministic helpers as subcommands; emits the workflow stage scripts). Supports Rust (cargo + clippy + cargo-mutants + cargo-fuzz) and C# (dotnet + Stryker.NET + SharpFuzz).
